name: playwright_myworks
description: Playtwright framework with page object model and data driven testing

scripts.allure:report: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.allure:fresh: npm run allure:clean && playwright test tests/e2e_Registeruser.spec.ts && npm run allure:generate
scripts.allure:fresh:open: npm run allure:fresh && npm run allure:open
scripts.allure:ci: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:ci && npm run allure:generate

author: Rajkumar
